text:
Good! Now please:

1. Refresh the page
2. Go to the Revoke tab and revoke an approval
3. After it succeeds, go to the History tab
4. Open the browser console (F12 → Console tab) and share what logs you see

The console logs will show:
- "Saved revoke transaction to localStorage: [hash]" when a revoke is saved
- "Loaded revoke history from localStorage: X transactions" when loading history
- "Combined history: X transactions" showing the total

This will help me understand if the transactions are being saved and loaded correctly.
